Company: The name of the company participating in the partnership
Year: The year the partnership took place
Partner_Organization: The name of the organization or entity that the company partnered with
Program_Name: The name of the specific program or initiative resulting from the partnership
Media_Coverage_Value: The estimated value of positive media coverage generated by the partnership
Customer_Acquisition_Cost_Reduction: The percentage reduction in customer acquisition cost as a result of the partnership
Brand_Sentiment_Score_Increase: The increase in brand sentiment scores in participating cities as a result of the partnership
